text.title: Instagram Content Creation and Agent Gotchas
text.summary: Caption rules, carousel structure, DM automation constraints, and agent-specific failure modes.

rule.statement: Caption hook must appear in the first line (before "more"); sweet spot length 150-200 characters; always include CTA.
rule.rationale: Instagram truncates captions after the first line in the feed view. A hook in the first line pulls viewers to expand. Captions over 2,200 characters are permitted but rarely read in full.

rule.statement: Enforce a max-words-per-slide constraint for carousel scripts; reject slide 1 with more than 10 words.
rule.rationale: Carousel slides with 30+ words on slide 1 fail because viewers swipe before reading. Large, readable text on a simple visual stops the scroll.

rule.statement: Only use approved ManyChat flows for DM automation. Never use unofficial APIs to auto-send DMs at scale.
rule.rationale: Instagram restricts DM automation to approved partners (Messenger Platform). Unapproved bots get accounts flagged or suspended. Agents must never send DMs via unofficial APIs regardless of scale.

antipattern.description: LLM-generated captions with heavy exclamation marks and emojis.
antipattern.reason: LLMs default to enthusiastic, emoji-heavy Instagram captions. This reads as inauthentic and degrades brand credibility. Explicitly prohibit exclamation marks and emojis (or set a strict per-post limit) in every prompt.

antipattern.description: Agent picks trending hashtags from training data.
antipattern.reason: Hashtag trends change weekly. Training-data hashtag suggestions are stale. Fetch current top hashtags via a research subagent or manual lookup before generating content.

antipattern.description: All Reel scripts follow listicle structure ("3 tips for X").
antipattern.reason: LLMs default to listicle format. Overuse of listicles reduces content variety and engagement. Force narrative or transformation arcs periodically to avoid audience fatigue.

antipattern.description: Agent recommends "trending audio" without an external lookup.
antipattern.reason: The model cannot know current trending audio on Instagram — it has no real-time data. Require an external lookup before the agent recommends audio choices.
